title: Anyone notice this
wikitext:
[]: Anyone notice this? (Spoilers)             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Oct 08, 2009 8:17 pm The Angels all seem to be callbacks to the ones that got left out: Tunniel moves and acts a lot like Sandalphon. Clockiel has Matariel's legs and entrance. Sahaquiel's first form reminds me a lot of Leliel-A giant black and white ball floating for no discernable reason. Bardiel's ability to infect new hosts, and it's new ability to mutate are reminiscent of Ireul as well as the original Bardiel fight. Zeruel and Tabris are probably the exceptions here. Tabris for obvious reasons, and Zeruel's first form is really just a callback to his original design.

[]:             Quote Post by Armitage » Thu Oct 08, 2009 8:25 pm I actually thought it was pretty convincing that Tunniel may be a autopsied Gaghiel .

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Oct 08, 2009 8:26 pm I KNEW I forgot one of them. I forgot about the fish.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Oct 08, 2009 8:27 pm Tunniel is more like Gaghiel in actions, but its purpose is similar to Sandalphon's: muddying up the question of "Where do Angels come from?"

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 08, 2009 9:25 pm Poor Tunny, did nothing wrong..Just sleeping and this happen. I do feel that it looked different at one point and a lot like gag.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Oct 09, 2009 2:26 am IIRC, Tunniel also had a ball somewhere around his midsection that was sorta Leliel-ish. And the "Black (rather Rainbow) Holes" that are generated when an Impact happens gave me Sea of Dirac flashbacks. So i guess Leliel was in the movie after all, only in a distributed form. Also, the way Clockiel pulled the "I die.. not!" stunt and the fact that he was defeated with an Inazuma/Rider/whatever kick reminded me of Israfel (the Twingel). As a side note, how the hell could Misato discern that Clockiel was just faking his death? The last time i checked, all of Nerv's equipment wasn't enough to get some usable data out of an Angel's corpse (in the series), and now she just "knew". 


[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Fri Oct 09, 2009 2:57 am SaltyJoe wrote: As a side note, how the hell could Misato discern that Clockiel was just faking his death? The last time i checked, all of Nerv's equipment wasn't enough to get some usable data out of an Angel's corpse (in the series), and now she just "knew".

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Fri Oct 09, 2009 3:02 am SaltyJoe wrote: As a side note, how the hell could Misato discern that Clockiel was just faking his death? The last time i checked, all of Nerv's equipment wasn't enough to get some usable data out of an Angel's corpse (in the series), and now she just "knew".

[]:             Quote Post by Dirty Mick » Fri Oct 09, 2009 6:49 am Did anyone else get strong Sachiel vibes from this new Zeruel? He makes his entrance exactly like the former did, and has the same basic color configuration. Heck, he even gets his ribs ripped off and just laid and took it for a moment; granted he eventually got back up but still.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Oct 09, 2009 10:37 am toe mash wrote: The same way she knew Sachiel was about to self destruct in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Fri Oct 09, 2009 12:54 pm SaltyJoe wrote: IIRC, that was more of a question:"Is it going to self destruct?" Here, she predicted what the Angel will do next on the fly. I just found it strange, it's certainly not an issue by any means.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Fri Oct 09, 2009 3:35 pm I'm not sure if you guys watched the director' cut of the series but in episode 23 Armisael, transforms in to a GIANT GLOWING Rei, which is similas to when Zeruel took Rei's form in RoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Oct 09, 2009 3:37 pm Eva4Dummies wrote: I'm not sure if you guys watched the director' cut of the series but in episode 23 Armisael, transforms in to a GIANT GLOWING Rei, which is similas to when Zeruel took Rei's form in RoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 09, 2009 5:32 pm Good point about the references. I also like the fact that the Angels Shinji personally is fighting (not Tunnely and Clocky) are ones that Shinji/etc personally fought against in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Oct 10, 2009 9:40 am toe mash wrote: Sorry I just had to :p

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sat Oct 10, 2009 11:36 am SaltyJoe wrote: Don't worry. Rei will be killed by Kaworu this time around (along with most of humanity).

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sat Oct 10, 2009 8:26 pm GNR will grapple with GNK while Shinji watched trying to discern if he's gone insane or is just having a particularly bizarre wet dream
